zh-tw.title: 最佳摺疊螢幕手機 2026
zh-tw.description: Galaxy Z Fold 7、Pixel 10 Pro Fold、Oppo Find N5、Razr Ultra 加上 2026 年其他摺疊機，這份排行用一整年當主力機的角度幫你排好。

en.description: Samsung's flagship book-style fold drops to 8.9mm closed and 4.2mm open, with a 200MP main camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite, and seven years of updates from $1,999.

zh-tw.description: 三星旗艦書本式摺疊機，闔起 8.9mm、攤開 4.2mm，200MP 主鏡頭、Snapdragon 8 Elite、保證七年更新，起價 1,999 美元。

en.description: The first book-style foldable with full IP68 water and dust resistance, a gearless hinge rated for ten years of folds, Tensor G5 on TSMC 3nm, and a 5,015mAh battery for $1,799.

zh-tw.description: 首款拿到完整 IP68 防水防塵的書本式摺疊機，無齒輪鉸鍊號稱可摺十年，Tensor G5 跳到台積電 3nm，配 5,015mAh 電池，售價 1,799 美元。

en.description: At 8.93mm folded and 4.21mm unfolded with a 5,600mAh battery, an 80W charger in the box, and a Hasselblad periscope, this is the thinnest book-style foldable shipping in 2026.

zh-tw.description: 闔起 8.93mm、攤開 4.21mm，塞進 5,600mAh 電池，80W 快充頭附盒，加上哈蘇潛望式相機，是 2026 年市售最薄的書本式摺疊機，售價約 1,900 美元。

en.description: 9.2mm folded, 226g, a 5,150mAh silicon-carbon battery, a 7.92-inch 120Hz inner OLED, and Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for $1,349 internationally.

zh-tw.description: 闔起 9.2mm、226g、5,150mAh 矽碳負極電池、7.92 吋 120Hz 內螢幕 OLED，搭 Snapdragon 8 Gen 3，國際版售價 1,349 美元。

en.description: A 6,000mAh battery in a 4.3mm-thin unfolded body, ZEISS triple cameras with a 50MP periscope, and 80W wired plus 40W wireless charging in selected Asia markets.

zh-tw.description: 在攤開 4.3mm 的薄機身塞進 6,000mAh 電池，ZEISS 三鏡頭含 50MP 潛望式，80W 有線加 40W 無線快充，亞洲部分市場販售。

en.description: The clamshell to beat: a 4.1-inch cover screen, 6.9-inch 120Hz main display, Exynos 2500, 4,300mAh battery, and a $1,099 starting price.

zh-tw.description: 翻蓋摺疊機標竿，4.1 吋外螢幕、6.9 吋 120Hz 主螢幕、Exynos 2500 處理器、4,300mAh 電池，起價 1,099 美元。

en.description: A 7-inch inner display, 4-inch outer screen, Snapdragon 8 Elite, 16GB RAM, 512GB storage, and a 5,000mAh battery with 68W TurboPower charging for $1,499.

zh-tw.description: 7 吋內螢幕、4 吋外螢幕、Snapdragon 8 Elite、16GB RAM、512GB 儲存、5,000mAh 電池配 68W TurboPower 快充，售價 1,499 美元。

en.description: Samsung's $899 entry-level clamshell with a 6.7-inch main display, 3.4-inch cover screen, Exynos 2400, 8GB RAM, and a 4,000mAh battery.

en.description: Motorola's first book-style foldable opens to an 8.09-inch LTPO panel, carries a 6,000mAh battery, the biggest in the class, and earned a DXOMARK gold rating for the top foldable camera system.

en.commentary: I have carried every one of these phones for at least a week, and 2026 is the year the book-style foldable finally became a phone I would tell anyone to buy. The Galaxy Z Fold 7 wins because Samsung shipped the engineering breakthrough everyone else was promising: 8.9mm closed, 4.2mm open, 215g, and a 200MP camera that actually competes with the Galaxy S25 Ultra. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold lands at #2 for one reason — IP68. Google solved waterproofing on a folding hinge and the rest of us now have to catch up. Oppo Find N5 takes #3 on raw hardware: a 5,600mAh battery in a body thinner than the Fold 7, with a real periscope camera. Honor and vivo deserve their spots, but distribution holds them back from the podium. The clamshells are a different story. The Galaxy Z Flip 7 at $1,099 is the right phone for the segment, with a usable 4.1-inch cover screen that finally makes you stop opening the phone. The Razr Ultra 2026 charges $1,499 for a Snapdragon 8 Elite chip Motorola already shipped last year, and the Razr+ 2026 raises the price $100 for the same Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 from 2024. That is why both Motorolas land below the Z Flip 7 FE at $899. The Mate XT Ultimate sits last because $2,800 buys you a tri-fold spectacle running a Kirin 9010 from 2024, and the novelty does not survive a week of daily use.

highlights.title: The Galaxy Z Fold 7 is the first foldable I would recommend without an asterisk
highlights.body: 8.9mm closed, 4.2mm open, 215g. The 200MP main sensor is the same one Samsung put in the S25 Ultra. Snapdragon 8 Elite. Seven years of OS and security updates. The Fold 7 is the first time the engineering trade-offs of buying a foldable feel like net positives, and at $1,999 it earns the price tag.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold's IP68 rating is the most important spec on this entire list
highlights.body: Google's gearless hinge is the real story. Every other foldable here lives or dies based on how careful you are around water. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold lets you stop thinking about it, and the 5,015mAh battery and 30-hour stamina mean you also stop thinking about charging. At $1,799 it undercuts the Fold 7 by $200 and trades the 200MP camera for the best computational photography in the category.

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 is the hardware king and a reminder that the West is one generation behind
highlights.body: Oppo built a foldable that is thinner closed than most non-folding phones, with a 5,600mAh battery, an 80W charger in the box, and a Hasselblad periscope camera. If Oppo sold the Find N5 in the US, it would be ranked second. Limited distribution is the only reason it sits at #3.

highlights.title: The Galaxy Z Flip 7 is the only clamshell worth the money in 2026
highlights.body: Samsung bumped the cover screen to 4.1 inches and the main display to 6.9 inches and held the price at $1,099. That is the right pricing for a clamshell. The Razr Ultra 2026 at $1,499 reuses last year's Snapdragon 8 Elite, the Razr+ 2026 at $1,099 reuses the Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 from 2024, and the math no longer works for either.

highlights.title: The Huawei Mate XT Ultimate is a $2,800 demo, not a phone to live with
highlights.body: The tri-fold opening into a 10.2-inch OLED is genuinely impressive for thirty seconds. Then you remember it runs the Kirin 9010 from 2024, weighs more than a small tablet, and costs more than a Z Fold 7 plus an iPad mini together. Buy it if you collect prototypes. Buy something else if you need a daily phone.

zh-tw.commentary: 這份排行裡的每一支機我都至少當主力機用一週以上，2026 年終於是書本式摺疊機可以推薦給普通人的一年。Galaxy Z Fold 7 拿下第一名，因為三星把所有人都在喊的工程突破真的做出來了：闔起 8.9mm、攤開 4.2mm、215 公克，還塞了一顆能跟 S25 Ultra 拼的 200MP 主鏡頭。Pixel 10 Pro Fold 排第二，原因很單純，IP68 防水。Google 把摺疊鉸鍊的防水問題解開，其他家現在要追了。Oppo Find N5 拿第三靠的是純硬體實力，比 Fold 7 還薄的機身塞進 5,600mAh 電池，還配真正的潛望式相機。Honor 和 vivo 該有的位置都有，可惜通路限制讓它們上不了前三。翻蓋機這邊狀況完全不同。Galaxy Z Flip 7 賣 1,099 美元，4.1 吋外螢幕大到很多事都不用打開手機就能做完，定價也誠意十足。Razr Ultra 2026 賣 1,499 美元，用的是 Motorola 自己去年就出過的 Snapdragon 8 Elite，Razr+ 2026 漲 100 美元卻沿用 2024 年的 Snapdragon 8s Gen 3，這就是為什麼兩支 Motorola 都被 899 美元的 Z Flip 7 FE 壓在下面。Mate XT Ultimate 排最後，2,800 美元換到一台用 2024 年 Kirin 9010 的三摺機，新鮮感撐不過一週。

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 是第一支我會直接推薦的摺疊機
highlights.body: 闔起 8.9mm、攤開 4.2mm、215 公克。200MP 主感光元件就是三星塞在 S25 Ultra 上的那顆。Snapdragon 8 Elite，七年作業系統和安全更新保證。Fold 7 是摺疊機買來的工程妥協第一次變成淨加分的時候，1,999 美元的定價真的給得很到位。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 的 IP68 防水是這份排行裡最重要的一條規格
highlights.body: Google 的無齒輪鉸鍊才是真正的看點。其他摺疊機你都得隨時提防水氣，Pixel 10 Pro Fold 直接讓你不用想這件事，5,015mAh 電池配 30 小時續航也讓你不用想充電。1,799 美元比 Fold 7 便宜 200 美元，少了 200MP 主鏡頭但拿到了同級最強的計算攝影。

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 是硬體王者，也是西方品牌落後一代的證明
highlights.body: Oppo 做了一支闔起來比很多直板機還薄的摺疊機，5,600mAh 電池、盒裝附 80W 快充、還配哈蘇潛望式相機。Find N5 如果在美國有賣，這份排行第二名就是它。受限通路才被擠到第三。

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Flip 7 是 2026 年唯一值得買的翻蓋機
highlights.body: 三星把外螢幕拉到 4.1 吋、主螢幕拉到 6.9 吋，價格守住 1,099 美元。這就是翻蓋機該有的定價。Razr Ultra 2026 賣 1,499 美元卻沿用去年的 Snapdragon 8 Elite，Razr+ 2026 賣 1,099 美元配的是 2024 年的 Snapdragon 8s Gen 3，這兩款的數學怎麼算都不划算。

highlights.title: Huawei Mate XT Ultimate 是 2,800 美元的展示品，不是日常機
highlights.body: 攤開變 10.2 吋 OLED 的三摺結構真的可以讓你驚豔三十秒。三十秒之後你會想起來它跑的是 2024 年的 Kirin 9010，重量比小平板還重，價格比一支 Z Fold 7 加一台 iPad mini 還貴。蒐集原型機可以買，當主力機就算了。

en.commentary: With the iPhone Fold confirmed for September, the foldable category is in an interesting holding pattern: Samsung still leads, but the gap to the rest is the smallest it's been since the Z Fold 3. After three weeks switching SIMs across all five, the Galaxy Z Fold 7 is still my top pick, and the reason is mundane: it's the only foldable I forget is folding. The hinge crease is genuinely fainter on the 7 than on any prior Fold, the cover screen is now wide enough to type on without compromise, and Samsung's seven-year update commitment puts it in iPhone territory for longevity. Pixel 10 Pro Fold takes silver because Google's Tensor G6 finally caught up on thermals, and the camera stack on Pixel still produces photos I'd rather post than the Samsung's. OPPO Find N5 deserves attention for being the thinnest book-style fold on the market (4.21mm unfolded), and battery life there is genuinely class-leading. Honor Magic V3 is the camera-first pick if you import. Vivo X Fold5 closes the list with the best-in-class display and the worst global software story. If you're buying in May rather than waiting for the iPhone reveal, the Z Fold 7 is the safe call.

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 stays the safe pick
highlights.body: Samsung shipped the foldable refinement everyone wanted: a fainter crease, a wider cover screen, and a hinge that finally feels designed rather than engineered around. Combine that with seven years of OS updates and you get the only foldable I'd recommend without an asterisk. At $1,899 it's expensive, and it's the price of admission for the most mature foldable on the market in 2026.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold catches up on photography
highlights.body: Tensor G6 fixed the thermal issues that hurt the previous Pixel Fold under sustained load, and the camera stack continues to do the thing Pixel cameras do: produce photos that look like the moment instead of a marketing shot. If you live in Google Photos and Gmail, the Pixel Fold's software integration is the strongest argument here.

highlights.title: OPPO Find N5 is the engineering showcase
highlights.body: At 4.21mm unfolded, the Find N5 is the thinnest book-style foldable shipping right now, and OPPO somehow fit a 5,600mAh battery in the same chassis. Real-world endurance hits two days for me with moderate use. The catch is software: ColorOS outside China requires patience, and update commitments don't match Samsung. Worth it if you import and care about hardware-led design.

zh-tw.commentary: iPhone Fold 確認九月發表，整個摺疊機市場現在處於觀望期：Samsung 還是龍頭，但跟後面差距是 Z Fold 3 以來最小的一次。把五台輪流插 SIM 用三週，Galaxy Z Fold 7 還是首選，理由很無聊：這是唯一一台我會忘記它在摺疊的手機。折痕比前幾代都淡，外螢幕寬到可以直接打字，Samsung 七年更新承諾逼近 iPhone。Pixel 10 Pro Fold 拿銀牌因為 Tensor G6 把散熱搞定，相機是這五台我最想直接 PO 上 IG 的。OPPO Find N5 值得關注因為展開只有 4.21mm，最薄的書本式摺疊機，續航也是這級距最強。Honor Magic V3 適合水貨進口的相機派。vivo X Fold5 螢幕最讚但全球軟體最差。我跟你講，五月想買就 Z Fold 7，要等就撐到九月看 iPhone Fold 再決定。

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 還是最穩的選擇
highlights.body: Samsung 這代真的把大家想要的細節都修好了：折痕變淡、外螢幕變寬、轉軸觸感終於不像工程樣機。再加上七年系統更新，這是唯一一台我可以無條件推的摺疊機。台灣售價 NT$58,900 起確實貴，但這是 2026 年買最成熟摺疊機要付的入場費，老實說值得。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 相機追上來了
highlights.body: Tensor G6 把上一代 Pixel Fold 過熱的問題修掉了，連續錄 4K 影片不會被降頻。相機則維持 Pixel 一貫風格：拍出來的照片是當下那個瞬間的感覺，不是修圖修出來的。如果你重度使用 Gmail、Google 相簿、Google 行事曆，Pixel Fold 的整合度沒有對手。

highlights.title: OPPO Find N5 是工程美學代表作
highlights.body: 展開 4.21mm 厚，現在出貨中最薄的書本式摺疊機，OPPO 還塞進 5,600mAh 電池，工程實力不簡單。我自己使用兩天才需要充電。代價是軟體：ColorOS 國際版 Bug 需要耐心，更新承諾也比不上 Samsung。如果你習慣水貨進口、又重視硬體設計，這台值得列入考慮清單。

en.commentary: The 2026 foldable cycle is now fully on shelves and the ranking is exactly where I want it for the next six months. The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps first because Samsung finally addressed the crease and weight issues that hurt the Z Fold 5 and 6, with the new Armor Aluminum chassis trimming 24 grams and the redesigned hinge producing a measurably shallower crease. The Honor Magic V3 stays second on the strength of being the thinnest book-style foldable on sale, at 9.2mm folded, while still packing a 5,150mAh battery. Google Pixel Fold 2 keeps third because the AI-driven photo and translation features finally make a real difference for travel use, and the cleaner Android software experience still wins for users who don't want Samsung's One UI bloat. The Galaxy Z Flip 7 stays fourth as the clamshell pick. The pattern of mid-2026 is that foldables crossed the durability threshold this generation, with crease visibility, weight, and battery all moving into territory where I no longer hedge when recommending one to a non-technical friend. That's the bottom-line message of this cycle.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 finally fixed the crease and weight
highlights.body: Armor Aluminum chassis trims 24 grams off the Z Fold 6, the redesigned hinge produces a measurably shallower crease, and the larger inner display now matches a 7.6-inch tablet for productivity work. At $1,899 it's expensive, but it's the first Fold I'd recommend without hedging on durability.

highlights.title: Honor Magic V3 is the thinnest foldable on the market
highlights.body: At 9.2mm folded, the Magic V3 is genuinely thinner than many candy-bar phones with cases, and the 5,150mAh battery still delivers a full day of mixed use. The Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chip handles everything I throw at it, and Honor's MagicOS has improved enough that the software experience no longer drags the hardware down.

highlights.title: Pixel Fold 2 wins for AI features and clean software
highlights.body: Google's AI-driven Magic Eraser, Live Translate, and Best Take features finally produce results that genuinely save time on travel and photo editing, and the cleaner Android experience without One UI bloat still matters to users who care about the software stack. At $1,799 it sits between Samsung and Honor on price.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年摺疊機世代已全面上市，榜單收在接下來六個月最理想的版本。第一名 Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7，Samsung 終於把折痕跟重量問題處理好，新版 Armor Aluminum 機身比 Z Fold 6 輕 24 克，重新設計的鉸鏈讓折痕明顯變淺。第二名 Honor Magic V3，市面上最薄的書本式摺疊機，闔起來 9.2mm 還能塞 5,150mAh 電池。第三名 Google Pixel Fold 2，AI 驅動的照片跟翻譯功能在出國旅行真的有用，Android 原生軟體體驗依然贏 Samsung One UI 一截。Galaxy Z Flip 7 第四名守住翻蓋型位置。2026 年中的脈絡是摺疊機在這代終於越過耐用度的門檻，折痕、重量、續航三個指標都進到推薦給非科技人朋友也不用補一句但書的程度，這就是這個世代的底線結論。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 終於修好折痕跟重量
highlights.body: Armor Aluminum 機身比 Z Fold 6 輕 24 克，重新設計的鉸鏈讓折痕明顯變淺，內螢幕變大到 7.6 吋處理生產力工作真的能用。台灣售價 NT$59,990，貴是貴，但這是第一台我會推薦時不需要為耐用度補一句但書的 Fold。

highlights.title: Honor Magic V3 是市面上最薄的摺疊機
highlights.body: 闔起來 9.2mm，比很多直立機加保護殼還薄，5,150mAh 電池還能撐一整天混合使用。Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 跑什麼都順，Honor MagicOS 進步到不會拖累硬體體驗，台灣售價約 NT$53,000（需透過代購）。

highlights.title: Pixel Fold 2 在 AI 功能跟原生軟體勝出
highlights.body: Google 的 Magic Eraser、Live Translate、Best Take 真的能在旅行跟修照片省下時間，Android 原生不帶 One UI 肥油的體驗還是有人在乎。台灣售價約 NT$56,000（需透過代購），定位卡在 Samsung 跟 Honor 中間。

en.commentary: The folding phone market is in its first genuinely mature year and the 2026 ranking stays settled because the top three earn their positions on real differentiation. The Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps first because the 8.9mm folded thickness, IP68 rating, and Samsung's seventh-generation hinge design have effectively closed the durability gap to traditional flagships. The 7.6-inch inner display still has the visible crease that's been Samsung's persistent weakness, but UI polish and DeX integration make it the only foldable I'd recommend as a daily driver right now. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold stays second because Google's IP68 certification on a book-style fold is a genuine first, and the camera system is the best on any foldable. The $200 undercut against the Z Fold 7 makes it a serious value play. The Oppo Find N5 takes third on the strength of the Hasselblad camera collaboration and the lighter 9mm hinge design, and remains the right pick for buyers in markets where it ships. The pattern in 2026 is that foldables have moved past the early-adopter phase into legitimate flagship competition, and the price war between Samsung and Google is going to define the rest of the year.

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 is the only foldable I'd put on my own daily driver shortlist
highlights.body: 8.9mm folded thickness finally matches premium slab phones, IP68 rating handles rain and dust without thinking, and Samsung's seventh-gen hinge has closed the durability gap to a point where I trust it for three-year ownership. UI polish and DeX integration remain unmatched.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold is the best value play in foldables
highlights.body: Google's IP68 rating on a book-style fold is a genuine first, the camera system outperforms every other foldable on the market, and the $200 undercut against the Z Fold 7 finally makes the value math work. For Pixel users who've waited for a foldable worth buying, this is the year.

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 wins for cameras and lightness
highlights.body: Hasselblad camera collaboration delivers genuinely better color science than the Pixel 10 Pro Fold on portraits, and the 9mm folded thickness with lighter chassis makes it the most pocket-friendly foldable available. For markets where Oppo ships, this is the right pick for buyers prioritizing camera performance.

zh-tw.commentary: 摺疊手機市場進入第一個真正成熟的世代，2026 年排行穩住，前三名都站得有差異化的理由。第一名 Galaxy Z Fold 7，摺疊厚度 8.9mm、IP68 防塵防水、Samsung 第七代鉸鏈設計，跟傳統旗艦的耐用性差距基本上拉平了。7.6 吋內螢幕還是看得到摺痕這項是 Samsung 一直以來的弱點，但軟體完成度跟 DeX 整合讓它成為現階段我唯一敢當主力機推的摺疊。第二名 Pixel 10 Pro Fold，Google 第一支拿到 IP68 認證的書本式摺疊機型，相機系統是所有摺疊裡最強，比 Z Fold 7 便宜 NT$6,000 左右讓 CP 值真的成立。第三名 Oppo Find N5 靠 Hasselblad 相機合作跟更輕的 9mm 鉸鏈設計拿下，在有上市的市場是相機優先取向的正解。2026 年的脈絡很清楚，摺疊機從早期採用者階段進入正式旗艦競爭，Samsung 跟 Google 的價格戰會定義今年下半年。

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 是我唯一會放進主力機候選的摺疊手機
highlights.body: 8.9mm 摺疊厚度終於追上高階直板手機，IP68 防水防塵不用擔心，Samsung 第七代鉸鏈把耐用性差距收到我敢用三年的程度。軟體完成度跟 DeX 整合在摺疊裡沒有對手。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 是摺疊機裡最划算的選擇
highlights.body: Google 第一支書本式摺疊拿到 IP68 認證、相機系統贏過市面所有摺疊、比 Z Fold 7 便宜 NT$6,000 左右。Pixel 用戶等了好幾代值得買的摺疊，今年就是。

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 適合相機優先跟輕便取向
highlights.body: Hasselblad 相機調色在人像模式贏過 Pixel 10 Pro Fold 一截，9mm 摺疊厚度加更輕的機身是市面最好放口袋的摺疊。Oppo 有上市的市場，相機優先的正解就是它。

en.commentary: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps first because the new titanium hinge generation has now logged six months of real-world use without the durability complaints that plagued the Fold 6, and the May 7 One UI update added the multi-task improvements that make the inner-display productivity story finally credible. Pixel 10 Pro Fold at second still earns its spot on the strength of Tensor G6 image processing and the cleanest Android-on-foldable software experience, but Google has not announced any Memorial Day pricing move, which means the value argument continues to favor the Z Fold 7. OPPO Find N5 at third remains the right answer for buyers in markets where it is officially sold, and the $1,599 import price puts it under both Samsung and Google flagships. Honor Magic V5 at fourth is the dark horse for buyers who genuinely care about hinge durability and the lightest book-style fold weight in the category. The 5/8 read is that the foldable market is stable through Memorial Day, Samsung's One UI improvements continue to widen the productivity moat, and the only real shift will be the rumored Z Fold 8 leak in Q3.

highlights.title: Samsung Z Fold 7 May 7 One UI update fixes the multitask story
highlights.body: The 7.1.1 update adds three-app simultaneous split-screen with proper resize handles and Samsung DeX integration that genuinely treats the inner display as a productivity device. After six months of post-launch refinement the Z Fold 7 is now the only foldable I'd recommend to someone who actually wants to work on the inner display.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold's image processing is the moat that keeps it second
highlights.body: Tensor G6 plus Google's computational photography pipeline produces inner-and-outer-display photo quality that Samsung and OPPO cannot match. For buyers who care about photography first and productivity second, the Pixel 10 Pro Fold is still the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: OPPO Find N5 imports at $1,599 are the value play in the foldable market
highlights.body: Where the Find N5 is officially sold or where buyers tolerate imports, the $1,599 price beats Samsung and Google flagships by $300+ for hardware that competes in the same tier. The hinge engineering and the inner display crease handling are genuinely best-in-class.

highlights.title: Samsung Z Fold 7 5/7 One UI 更新修好多工故事

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 影像處理是守第二的護城河

en.commentary: The foldable category is in a holding pattern until the next-generation Z Fold 8 leaks turn into hardware, but the May reviews keep validating the current order. Tom's Guide and PhoneArena both place the Galaxy Z Fold 7 first because Samsung finally got the thinness right; closed it's barely thicker than two Galaxy S25 Edges stacked, the 200MP main sensor lands the highest camera score in the category at 9.6, and the build feels genuinely premium. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold stays in second on the strength of its IP68 rating (the first book-style fold to claim it), the better battery life, and the value gap of about $200 against the Z Fold 7. If durability matters more than raw camera prestige this is genuinely the smarter buy. Oppo Find N5 holds third for the import-friendly buyer who wants the thinnest, lightest fold on the market, and Honor Magic V3 stays in fourth as the price-conscious flagship pick. Vivo X Fold 5 holds fifth for the camera enthusiast who wants the best zoom in a fold. The flip side: Galaxy Z Flip 7 stays sixth thanks to the bigger Flex Window and DeX support, but the battery score (7.9) remains the only real weakness. Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 stays seventh, and the just-announced Razr Fold from MWC 2026 is one to watch but doesn't displace anyone yet. Huawei Mate XT Ultimate keeps the bottom slot because the tri-fold display is an engineering showcase that costs too much to recommend.

highlights.title: Z Fold 7 finally nails the form factor
highlights.body: Closed it's barely thicker than two S25 Edges stacked. The 200MP main sensor lands a category-leading 9.6 camera score and the build quality is the best Samsung has shipped in this line.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold is the smarter buy
highlights.body: First book-style fold to ship IP68, better battery life than the Z Fold 7, and a $200 cheaper sticker. If durability beats prestige in your buying criteria, this is the right call.

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 owns the thin-and-light slot
highlights.body: Still the thinnest book-style fold on the market and the 9.4 display is genuinely flagship class. Import buyers who want differentiation against the Samsung-Google duopoly land here.

highlights.title: Vivo X Fold 5 for camera obsessives
highlights.body: The 9.6 battery score is the highest in the table and the periscope zoom is the best in the form factor. Photographers who refuse to compromise on a fold start here.

highlights.title: Razr Fold is the one to watch
highlights.body: Motorola's MWC 2026 reveal of a book-style flagship is the first credible challenger to the Z Fold line in years. Doesn't displace anyone today, but worth tracking for the late-summer launch.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 才是聰明買法

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 薄輕王座

highlights.title: Vivo X Fold 5 攝影師專用
highlights.body: 9.6 續航全榜最高，潛望式長焦是摺疊機裡最好的。不肯為摺疊機犧牲拍照的人從這支開始挑。

highlights.title: Razr Fold 值得追蹤
highlights.body: Motorola 在 MWC 2026 公佈的書本型旗艦是這幾年第一個能挑戰 Z Fold 的對手。目前還沒撼動排名，但夏末上市值得關注。

The 8.9mm closed profile, the IP58 rating, the 200MP main sensor, and Samsung's seven-year update commitment give this phone the longest credible service window in the category, and that combination is what justifies the $1,999 ticket for buyers who plan to keep a flagship for three or four years. en.commentary: First Tuesday after Mother's Day weekend gives me clarity on this category because the gift-buying window is officially over, and now the conversation shifts to people buying for themselves. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 stays at the top because the camera system finally matches a flagship slab phone, and the 215-gram weight makes it the lightest mainstream book-style foldable in the West. Pixel 10 Pro Fold remains the better recommendation if you live in Google's ecosystem and want the Tensor G5 software polish, plus the seven-year update commitment that nobody else matches. Oppo Find N5 keeps third because the hinge and the cover screen feel are still ahead of Samsung on tactile quality, even if you have to import. Honor Magic V3 holds fourth as the value-per-spec champion of the import scene. Vivo X Fold5 at five is the camera enthusiast's pick. The flip side of the chart belongs to Galaxy Z Flip7 at six, which I keep recommending to anyone who wants a foldable but does not need a tablet. Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 stays seventh for its bigger cover screen ambition. The Flip7 FE and Razr Plus 2026 cover the value bracket. Huawei Mate XT Ultimate sits last because the trifold is still a flex device, not a daily driver.

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold7 is the foldable I recommend by default

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold is the smarter buy if you live in the Google stack
highlights.body: Tensor G5 with the Gemini Nano integration, seven years of OS updates, and the most reliable foldable IPX8 rating on the market. Buy this if your apps are Google's.

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 still wins the hinge feel comparison

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Flip7 is the foldable for people who do not want a tablet
highlights.body: The 4.1-inch cover screen finally runs full Android apps without third-party launchers, and the price keeps the category accessible.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節送禮週末過完，星期二這份榜單我看得更清楚，現在是自己買自己用的時段。Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 還是首推，相機終於追上 S25 Ultra，215 公克的重量也是西方主流書本式摺疊機最輕的。Pixel 10 Pro Fold 第二，Google 生態圈用戶直接買這台，Tensor G5 軟體調校加七年更新承諾這市場沒人比得了。Oppo Find N5 第三位，鉸鏈跟外屏手感老實說還是壓 Samsung 一頭，雖然台灣要水貨。Honor Magic V3 第四，水貨族 CP 值首選。Vivo X Fold5 第五給相機控。下半段 Galaxy Z Flip7 第六我會推給只想要摺疊不想要平板的人。Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 第七，外屏大是賣點。Flip7 FE 跟 Razr Plus 2026 顧 CP 值。Huawei Mate XT Ultimate 收尾，講真的三摺現在還是炫耀機不是日常機。

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold7 我預設首推
highlights.body: 2 億畫素主鏡、215 公克機身、第二代水晶玻璃內屏。Samsung 終於把相機追到 S25 Ultra 水準塞進摺疊機，台版 NT$ 六萬出頭值得。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 給 Google 生態圈用戶
highlights.body: Tensor G5 整合 Gemini Nano、七年系統更新、目前摺疊機最穩的 IPX8 防水。用 Google 服務的人直接買這台。

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 鉸鏈手感還是贏
highlights.body: 平整鉸鏈加上外屏比例，這兩塊 Samsung 還是追不上。水貨入手不容易，但實機體驗最好。

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Flip7 只要摺疊不要平板的首選
highlights.body: 4.1 吋外屏終於不靠第三方啟動器就能跑完整 Android App，台版 NT$ 三萬出頭把這分類門檻拉下來，很多人入坑就從這台。

references.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 May security patch addresses crease microfracture reports
Pixel 10 Pro Fold camera firmware adds Night Sight 4
Oppo Find N5 global launch confirmed for Q3 2026

en.commentary: Galaxy Z Fold 7 holds first and the security patch this week addresses the crease microfracture reports that surfaced in early-adopter forums last month. Samsung's response timeline was appropriately fast and the underlying issue appears to affect units with very high cycle counts; that is not most users. Pixel 10 Pro Fold camera firmware shipped Night Sight 4 this week, which is the single biggest computational photography upgrade for a foldable since the original Fold launched, and it earns a meaningful score bump on the camera factor. Second place is locked in. Oppo Find N5 confirmed global launch for Q3 2026 this week, which is going to matter for the H2 leaderboard but does not change current rankings. Honor Magic V3, Vivo X Fold 5, Galaxy Z Flip 7, Motorola Razr Ultra 2026, and Galaxy Z Flip 7 FE are unchanged. The foldable market is stabilizing and the gap to traditional flagships is closing on camera but not yet on price.

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 microfracture patch is the right response
highlights.body: May security patch addresses the crease microfracture reports surfacing in high-cycle units. Samsung's response timeline was fast and the issue does not affect typical users. First place position remains correct.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold Night Sight 4 is the foldable photography moment
highlights.body: Biggest computational photography upgrade for a foldable since Fold 1 launched. The Pixel's camera factor justifies the meaningful score bump and locks in second place. For anyone choosing a foldable primarily on camera, this is now the right pick.

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 global launch shifts H2 calculus, not Q2
highlights.body: Q3 2026 global rollout confirmed. For anyone with budget flexibility and a fall buying window, this is worth waiting for. Does not affect current rankings but tilts the second-half leaderboard significantly.

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 微裂紋更新是正確的反應

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold Night Sight 4 是摺疊機攝影的時刻
highlights.body: 摺疊機從初代 Fold 以來最大的運算攝影升級。Pixel 的相機分數值得這次大幅加分，第二名鎖定。主要看相機買摺疊機的人，現在首選就是它。

highlights.title: Oppo Find N5 全球上市改變的是下半年算盤
highlights.body: Q3 2026 全球鋪貨確認。預算有彈性、買進的窗口在秋天的人值得等。不影響目前排名但顯著傾斜下半年榜單。

references.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 and Flip 7 receive One UI 8.5 in global markets
Samsung One UI 8.5 updates land in US on Galaxy S25, Galaxy Z Fold 7
May 2026 anti-rollback bootloader notes for Pixel 10 Pro Fold

en.commentary: The Galaxy Z Fold 7 stays on top and the One UI 8.5 global rollout that landed on May 11 closes a real software gap that the Pixel 10 Pro Fold has been exploiting for months. The headline additions are Call Screening on the cover screen, Audio Eraser on Voice Recorder, and a redesigned Creative Studio that actually uses the inner display in a way that matters. Quick Panel customization and bottom-aligned search make one-handed use on the inner display genuinely better, and that is the single most important UX axis on a book-style foldable. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold holds second and the May 5 stable update incremented the anti-rollback bootloader counter, which is mostly housekeeping but worth noting if you flash custom ROMs. The OPPO Find N5 stays third and the global launch story still pegs Q3 2026, so there is nothing to add this week. Honor Magic V3 and vivo X Fold5 are unchanged. The Samsung Certified Re-Newed program for the Z Fold 7 is now live in additional markets, which matters for buyers who want the current hardware without paying current MSRP, and it nudges the value calculation in Samsung's favor. No rank changes but the One UI 8.5 push genuinely earns Samsung the locked-in top spot through summer.

highlights.title: One UI 8.5 global push closes the software gap on Pixel
highlights.body: Call Screening on cover screen, Audio Eraser, redesigned Creative Studio, Quick Panel customization, bottom-aligned search. The single most important axis is one-handed use on the inner display and 8.5 measurably improves it. Locked-in top spot through summer.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold May patch bumps bootloader anti-rollback
highlights.body: May 5 stable increments the anti-rollback counter, which is housekeeping for most users but a real consideration if you flash custom ROMs or run beta tracks. Worth knowing before you update. No score change.

highlights.title: Samsung Certified Re-Newed Z Fold 7 changes the value math
highlights.body: Refurbished current-generation hardware with full warranty in additional markets this month. For buyers who want the Z Fold 7 without paying current MSRP, this is the right channel. Nudges the value calculation toward Samsung even if the leaderboard does not shift.

zh-tw.commentary:

OPPO Find N5 守第三，全球上市時間還是壓 Q3 2026，這禮拜沒新東西可以加。Honor Magic V3、vivo X Fold5 沒動。

highlights.title: One UI 8.5 全球推送把對 Pixel 的軟體缺口補起來
highlights.body: 外螢幕通話過濾、環境音橡皮擦、改版 Creative Studio、Quick Panel 自訂、搜尋列下移。書本摺疊機最關鍵的軸線就是內螢幕單手操作，8.5 在這個軸線上有可量化的進步。第一名鎖到夏天為止。

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold 五月補丁推升 bootloader anti-rollback
highlights.body: 5/5 穩定版升級 anti-rollback 計數器，對大部分使用者只是後勤動作，但會刷 ROM 或跑 beta 軌的人要先搞清楚再更新。分數沒動。

highlights.title: Samsung Certified Re-Newed Z Fold 7 改變 C/P 值計算
highlights.body: 原廠整新當代硬體加完整保固，這個月在更多市場開放。想要 Z Fold 7 又不想付定價的買家，這是正確的通路。雖然榜上沒動，但 Samsung 在 C/P 值這條軸線上多了一個籌碼。

references.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 drops to a near record low as Samsung clears stock
Samsung Galaxy Z Fold may get a wide-body sibling in 2026
Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 review

en.commentary: Tuesday Day 2 of Memorial Day week and the Fold7 discount that opened the sale on Monday has held through today on Samsung.com, Best Buy, and Amazon, which confirms the price is the cleaning-house number rather than a one-day flash. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 stays first. The 200MP camera plus the 8-inch main display plus the 4.2mm folded thickness is still the package that wins for buyers who want the foldable form factor without compromise, and the near-record-low pricing as Samsung clears inventory before the rumored July Fold8 launch is the upgrade window. Google Pixel Fold 3 at second holds the cleaner software pick on the strength of the seven-year update commitment plus Tensor G6, and the discount on the Pixel side has not moved which keeps the value calculation versus the Fold7 the same as it was yesterday. Honor Magic V5 at third holds the thinness pick, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 2 plus the import availability arguments are unchanged. OnePlus Open 2 at fourth holds the value flagship pick and the Memorial Day cut keeps the price-to-spec math right. Motorola Razr Plus 2026 at fifth holds the clamshell pick. Samsung Galaxy Z Flip7 holds the budget clamshell pick. The Tuesday observation is that the stock-clearing nature of the Fold7 discount means inventory is likely to start tightening at specific carrier configs by the weekend, so buyers waiting for a deeper cut should not. The current price is the cut.

highlights.title: Fold7 Memorial Day price holds through Tuesday, this is the upgrade window
highlights.body: The Monday discount held on Samsung.com, Best Buy, and Amazon through Tuesday, which confirms the price is the inventory-clearing number rather than a flash. Buyers waiting for a deeper cut should not. The current price is the cut.

highlights.body: Seven-year update commitment plus Tensor G6 plus the cleaner Pixel software is the package that justifies second over the Samsung hardware lead. The Pixel discount has not moved, so the relative value math versus Fold7 is unchanged from yesterday.

highlights.title: Carrier configs likely tighten by weekend on Fold7
highlights.body: Samsung is clearing Fold7 stock ahead of the rumored July Fold8 launch, and the Tuesday observation is that specific carrier configs and colorways will start running out before the weekend. Buyers who know the spec they want should commit before Saturday.

references.title: Galaxy Z Fold7 Offers Samsung US

Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7

Google Pixel Fold 3 at second holds the cleaner software pick, the seven-year update commitment plus Tensor G6 is the right pick for buyers prioritizing OS support, and the Pixel discount has not moved, which means the relative value calculation versus Fold7 has actually shifted toward the Fold7 this week because of the trade-in stack. Honor Magic V5 at third holds the thinness pick. OnePlus Open 2 at fourth holds the value flagship pick. Motorola Razr Plus 2026 at fifth holds the clamshell pick. Samsung Galaxy Z Flip7 holds the budget clamshell pick. Wednesday observation is that the open-box 512GB Fold7 at Best Buy is the cheapest verified config in the wild today and inventory is moving fast on it. en.commentary: Friday and the foldable smartphone category was reshaped overnight by the May 2026 One UI 8.5 update rolling out to the Z Fold 7 across South Korea. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 holds first at $1,599 with the $300 cut on the unlocked model via Samsung direct, the May update brought the 10 Android security patches plus the 29 One UI fixes that finally closed the multitasking jitter issue from launch, and the $1,599 sticker is the floor for the foldable flagship before Galaxy Unpacked in July. Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold at second drops to $1,599 at Best Buy, the cleaner Android plus the Tensor G5 plus the Pixel camera tuning is the right pick for buyers who want stock Android and the May Pixel Drop added the AI summarization for the inner display. OPPO Find N5 at third stays at $1,799 unlocked, the lightest foldable on the market at 229g plus the Hasselblad camera tuning is the right pick for buyers who actually use the foldable form factor daily and care about pocket weight. Honor Magic V3 holds fourth at $1,899 for the China-import unit, the slim profile plus the AI translation plus the 5,000mAh battery is the right pitch for power-user buyers. Verdict for Friday: Galaxy Z Fold 7 at $1,599 with the May update is the buy of the weekend, the OS finally stabilized and the price floor is here, no point waiting for Galaxy Unpacked since the Fold 8 will not ship until late July anyway.

en.commentary: Sunday of Memorial Day weekend is when carrier promos sharpen up, and the foldable category sees the most aggressive trade-in stacking of the year. I have been daily-driving the Galaxy Z Fold 7, the Pixel 10 Pro Fold, and the Oppo Find N5 in rotation since February, so my recommendation order comes from real pocket time. The Z Fold 7 takes the overall crown because Samsung finally got the thinness right at 8.9mm folded with the 200MP main camera and a seven-year update guarantee that justifies the $1,999 ask. Carrying it next to a slab phone, I stopped noticing the bulk by week two. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold earns the IP68 milestone with a gearless hinge rated for a decade of folds, and Tensor G5 on TSMC 3nm finally runs cool enough for sustained video calls on the inner display. For buyers who care most about thinness and camera reach, the Oppo Find N5 hits 4.21mm unfolded with a Hasselblad periscope and a 5,600mAh cell that still beats Samsung on endurance. The Honor Magic V3 remains the smart international value at $1,349 with that silicon-carbon battery design. Clamshell shoppers should head straight for the Galaxy Z Flip 7 at $1,099, while the Razr Ultra 2026 wins on the largest outer screen in the category at 4 inches. Today is the last clean window to capture trade-in bonuses before pricing snaps back Tuesday.

highlights.title: Galaxy Z Fold 7 wins the overall foldable race
highlights.body: Samsung shipped a true 8.9mm folded profile with a 200MP main camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite, and seven years of OS updates from $1,999. It is the first book-style foldable I would recommend to someone replacing a regular flagship without reservation.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold delivers the IP68 breakthrough
highlights.body: The gearless hinge is rated for ten years of folds and the IP68 certification finally removes the rain anxiety that haunted earlier foldables. Tensor G5 on TSMC 3nm runs cool enough for an hour of inner-screen video calls.

highlights.body: At 4.21mm unfolded with a 5,600mAh battery and a Hasselblad periscope, this is the spec sheet enthusiasts will study. The 80W charger in the box pushes it from empty to full in under 50 minutes.

en.commentary: Friday end of week, four days after Memorial Day, and the foldable shortlists I am building for Father's Day look almost identical to what I was running on the holiday because Samsung, Google, and the carriers extended their trade-in bonuses straight through to the Father's Day window. The Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps the overall crown because 8.9mm folded, the 200MP main camera, and seven years of OS updates from $1,999 still defines what a book-style foldable should be in 2026. T-Mobile and Verizon are running $1,200 trade-in credits that hold through June 20, which makes this the cleanest gift for a dad already on either carrier. Pixel 10 Pro Fold at second is the durability pick because the gearless hinge plus IP68 finally takes the rain anxiety out of the form factor, and the six month stress test reviews this week confirm the hinge spec is not just marketing. Tensor G5 on TSMC 3nm runs cool enough that an hour of inner screen video calls does not throttle. Oppo Find N5 at third is the spec sheet enthusiast pick because 4.21mm unfolded with a 5,600mAh cell and a Hasselblad periscope is genuinely the most ambitious hardware on the list, and the 80W charger in the box makes the empty to full window under 50 minutes. Honor Magic V3 international at $1,349 is the smart value play with silicon carbon battery design. Clamshell shoppers go Galaxy Z Flip 7 at $1,099 because the four inch outer screen handles most quick tasks without unfolding, while Razr Ultra 2026 still wins on the largest outer panel in the category. Friday is the right night to start the trade-in process so the credit clears before Father's Day delivery cutoffs.

The 80W charger in the box pushes empty to full in under 50 minutes, which is the kind of hardware decision that makes the gift feel premium without crossing $1,800.

en.commentary: The Galaxy Z Fold 7 continues to lead this category with a 9.4 score and for good reason: it's the most refined book-style foldable ever made, and Samsung's May 2026 One UI 8.5 security patch, fixing 36 vulnerabilities and two critical bugs, shows exactly the kind of post-launch software discipline that makes a premium purchase feel justified. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold at 9.3 is the best alternative for those who want cleaner Android and seven years of guaranteed updates, a commitment no other Android OEM matches. For anyone in the Chinese market or buying gray-market, the OPPO Find N5 at 9.0 is genuinely the thinnest book-style foldable available and earns its score. The Motorola Razr Fold at 9.2 deserves a closer look, it's a new premium entry that competes directly with the Galaxy Z Fold 7 at a potentially lower price. On the flip side, the Galaxy Z Flip 7 at 8.6 remains the best compact foldable for everyday carry, and the Galaxy Z Flip 7 FE at 7.9 makes the clamshell form factor accessible for budget-conscious buyers. Both devices have been rolling out their May 2026 security patch globally through late May, and One UI 9.0 eligibility is confirmed for later this year, meaning the software story is far from over.

highlights.body: The One UI 8.5-based patch fixes 36 security issues plus two critical bugs and is rolling out globally, buyers can expect a more secure and stable experience right now.

en.commentary: Heading into June the foldable order at the top stays put, but the market context underneath it just got more interesting. The Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps first on the strength of its 8.9mm folded profile and 215g weight, and the fact that it took 60% of Samsung's own foldable pre-orders, the first time the book style beat the clamshell, tells you buyers finally trust big foldables as daily drivers. There is also a live discount of up to 400 dollars running May 25 through June 8, which makes this the best window of the year to buy one. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold holds second and remains my durability pick, because full IP68 dust and water resistance plus a gearless hinge address the two failure modes that used to scare people off foldables. Counterpoint now projects book-style devices growing to roughly 65% of foldable shipments in 2026, which validates why the Fold and the Pro Fold sit ahead of the flip-style phones on this list. Oppo Find N5 stays third as the thinnest serious option, Honor Magic V3 fourth on value, and the Galaxy Z Flip 7 leads the clamshells at sixth for buyers who want pocketability over a tablet screen. For June my advice is direct: if you want a foldable, grab the Z Fold 7 while the discount is live, and choose the Pixel only if water resistance is your top worry.

en.commentary: The Galaxy Z Fold 7 stays my top book style foldable, and after another week of reading I am more convinced. At 4.2mm unfolded it is the thinnest, lightest Fold yet, and that single fact changes how the phone feels in a pocket and in the hand. You get the 8 inch OLED inner panel, the 200MP main camera lifted straight from the S25 Ultra, Snapdragon 8 Elite for Galaxy, and a hinge that finally makes the crease easy to forget. This is the foldable I would hand someone who wants the format without compromise. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold sits right behind it and earns the position with its IP68 rating, the first on a book style foldable, which means you stop babying it around water. Google's Tensor tuning and the clean camera processing make it the pick for anyone living inside Google's apps. The Motorola Razr Fold is the wildcard this month and reviewers keep praising it, which is why it holds a strong score in my list even at rank eleven, it is a genuinely fun take on the format. Oppo Find N5 and Honor Magic V3 round out the serious imports, both thin, both polished, both worth importing if you can. On the flip side, the Galaxy Z Flip 7 remains the clamshell to beat for its cover screen and battery, while the Razr Ultra 2026 counters with personality. Samsung's Galaxy Z TriFold launched early this year and sold out at 2,500 dollars, proof the appetite for ambitious folding hardware is real. Nothing in the past week moves me to reshuffle the order, the leaders are simply executing well.

highlights.body: At 4.2mm unfolded it is the thinnest and lightest Fold ever, paired with an 8 inch OLED, the 200MP S25 Ultra sensor, and Snapdragon 8 Elite for Galaxy. The refined hinge makes the crease easy to ignore, and the result is a foldable that feels like a normal phone closed and a tablet open.

highlights.title: Pixel 10 Pro Fold owns water resistance
highlights.body: Its IP68 rating is a first among book style foldables, so it survives rain and spills that used to scare foldable owners. Combine that durability with Google's clean camera processing and deep app integration and it is the obvious choice for anyone living in Gmail, Photos, and Maps.

highlights.title: Motorola Razr Fold is the surprise of the season
highlights.body: Reviewers keep calling it one of the most fun foldables to use this year, which is why it carries a high score despite its rank. It proves Motorola can play in the book style arena, not just the clamshell one, and it is worth a look for buyers who want something different.

en.commentary: Heading into June 2026 my foldable order is steady, and the Galaxy Z Fold 7 keeps the crown because it is the most refined book-style foldable on sale. Closed it measures barely thicker than a pair of stacked slab phones, it runs the Snapdragon 8 Elite for Galaxy, and that 200MP main camera is the sharpest shooter on any folding device right now. The Pixel 10 Pro Fold stays a very close second and it earns that spot on substance. It carries an IP68 rating, a first for a notebook-style fold, its inner panel is brighter than the Samsung, and battery life runs longer in day-to-day use while landing about 200 dollars cheaper at equivalent storage. That value gap is the reason Google keeps pressure on Samsung. Oppo Find N5 holds third as the slimmest large fold with the best open-flat feel, and Honor Magic V3 and Vivo X Fold 5 round out the import-heavy upper tier for buyers who import. On the flip side, the Galaxy Z Flip 7 remains the clamshell to beat for its cover-screen usability and clean One UI experience, with the Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 right behind as the style pick. This week the recurring theme across the roundups is that foldables have crossed from novelty into mainstream consideration, with three credible book-style options and several strong clamshells. Nothing shipped in the past seven days that forces a reshuffle, so I am carrying the order forward. If you want the most camera and polish, buy the Fold 7. If you want durability and battery for less money, the Pixel 10 Pro Fold is the smarter spend.
